prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次约4297→3579→2696→1141→765名，呈持续快速前移趋势，近4年累计前移约3532名，2025年基准约765名；本省物理类计划2021年50人、2022年46人、2023年35人、2024年29人、2025年15人，逐年大幅缩减；2026年计划15人，与2025年持平，计划缩减趋势暂缓。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流、C9联盟成员、国防七子之首；软科主榜排名从2021年第11名→2022年第13名→2023年第13名→2024年第16名→2025年第14名→2026年第12名，近年排名回升至高位；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度高热（总排名第10），短视频曝光量高，反映报考关注度持续升温；2024年曾出现投档线暴跌相关讨论，但2025年位次已大幅回升，负面影响基本消化；拥有17个A-及以上学科，其中力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程为A+，计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、仪器科学与技术等为A，工科实力顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等核心工科专业2024年均为高热推荐，热度持续升温；本省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约1.58万人（+3.59%），竞争加剧；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，在广东省属跨省招生，近年本省计划持续缩减，2026年计划持平，跨省报考热度不减。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续快速前移、2026年招生计划持平、软科排名回升至第12名、抖音高热关注度、本省考生增加等因素，预计2026年竞争仍将保持高位，位次在2025年基准765名基础上继续小幅前移。预测最低位次约755名，区间669-841名。

一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（院士特色班）
- 工科试验班（AI院士特色班）（第1学年校本部，后3学年深圳校区）
- 工科试验班（未来技术拔尖班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间669-841名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档新设专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如669名以内）可重点冲击院士特色班和未来技术拔尖班等顶尖培养项目。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4297 → 3579 → 2696 → 1141 → 765, showing a continuous and rapid upward trend, with a cumulative advancement of about 3532 positions in the last 4 years, and a baseline of about 765 in 2025; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 50 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 15 in 2025, decreasing significantly year by year; the 2026 plan is 15, the same as 2025, indicating a temporary halt in the reduction trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, C9 League member, top of the Seven Sons of National Defense; the Soft Science main ranking went from 11th in 2021 → 13th in 2022 → 13th in 2023 → 16th in 2024 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026, with recent rankings rising to a high level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is high (10th overall), with high short video exposure, reflecting continuously increasing application attention; there was discussion about a sharp drop in admission cutoffs in 2024, but the ranking has significantly recovered in 2025, with negative impacts largely absorbed; it has 17 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering, and A in Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Instrument Science and Technology, etc., with top-tier engineering strength highly matched to the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication and Electrical Engineering and Automation were all highly recommended in 2024, with continuously rising popularity; the provincial Physics Category examinees in 2026 are about 456,000, an increase of about 15,800 (+3.59%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment in Guangdong Province, with the provincial plan continuously shrinking in recent years, but the 2026 plan remains flat, and cross-provincial application enthusiasm remains high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and rapid upward trend in historical rankings, the flat 2026 enrollment plan, the Soft Science ranking rising to 12th, high Douyin attention, and the increase in provincial examinees, it is expected that competition will remain high in 2026, with the ranking continuing to advance slightly from the 2025 baseline of 765. The predicted minimum ranking is about 755, with a range of 669-841.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 669-841, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 newly established majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 669), focus on targeting top training programs such as the Academician Special Class and Future Technology Top Class.
